column1: 日本語はもとより、英語でも対応できます。
column2: にほんごはもとより、えいごでもたいおうできます。
column3: We can handle not only Japanese but also English.
column4: はもとより (not only ~ but also, let alone, of course ~)
column5: Noun₁ + はもとより + Noun₂ + も
column6: states that Noun₁ is an obvious baseline, then adds Noun₂ as further reaching; 'Noun₁ goes without saying, and even Noun₂'
column8: はもとより = obvious baseline + further extension; はもちろん = of course/as well as (slightly less formal); だけでなく = not only but also; のみならず = not only (formal)
column10: module:04-n2 jlpt:n2 point:はもとより source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:low complexity:standard
